## Type of change
<!-- Tick all that apply. -->
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing behavior to change)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] CI / tooling / refactor (no user-facing change)

## How was this tested?
<!-- Commands run, scenarios exercised, fixtures added, etc. -->
- [ ] `make lint`
- [ ] `make typecheck`
- [ ] `make test`
- [ ] Manual CLI smoke test (`podifyr-ai generate …`)

## Checklist
- [ ] My code follows the project style (ruff + ruff-format clean)
- [ ] I have added/updated tests where appropriate
- [ ] I have added/updated documentation where appropriate
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md has been updated under the `Unreleased` section (if user-visible)
- [ ] No secrets, API keys, or proprietary data are included in this PR
